title: [v5.7] Add CreatedAt format option to podman artifact ls
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #27352

/assign rhatdan

```release-note
podman artifact list --format '{{ .CreatedAt }}' is now supported.
```

comments.body: The changes LGTM. I'm unsure about the [`sys podman fedora-42 rootless host sqlite`](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27366/checks?check_run_id=53654339595) CI failure, but the [`sys podman rawhide rootless host sqlite`](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27366/checks?check_run_id=53654339650) one seems flaky.

LGTM
I'll let @mheon press the shiny merge button
